{{CargoOrgan
|name=Quantum Core
|type=Bionic
|rank=purple
|id=10667
|idx=24
|description="The AI core of the future world achieves FTL data transfer and real-time computation through quantum entanglement, unlocking unparalleled combat capabilities."
—Skynet Surveillance Log
|skill=When attacked by the enemy, activate the Quantum Barrier, reducing DMG by 18% of the enemy's ATK!
|hp=1238
|def=198
|atk=179
|rush=131
|gene1=In Gene Sims, Wind DMG +120
|gene2=Per 5 Apostles defeated, {race} DEF +40
Apostles Defeated: 15/15
|gene3=All ELMT RES +20
|gene4=CRIT DMG REDUC +5%
|gene7=All ELMT RES +60 (Awakened)
|}}
